title: Byju's is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Byju's is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!
